description: Beta patch: dispatch channel runtime agent definitions, refresh registry-backed spec via update, add Reasonix platform support, ship devflow-session-insight bundled skill, and rename devflow-spec-bootstarp -> devflow-spec-bootstrap.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(cli): `devflow init` and `devflow update` now ship `.devflow/agents/{check,implement}.md`, so switching to a channel-driven workflow no longer fails with "Agent 'check' not found" (#323).
- feat(cli): `devflow update` refreshes registry-backed `.devflow/spec` templates through the existing hash/conflict flow. `devflow init --template <id>` persists the spec source/template in `.devflow/config.yaml` so subsequent updates can re-fetch it. Supports direct spec registries and marketplace-style registries (#324).
- feat(platform): add **Reasonix** (DeepSeek-Reasonix) as the 15th supported AI coding tool via `devflow init --reasonix`. Subagent skills (`devflow-implement`, `devflow-check`) carry `runAs: subagent` frontmatter so Reasonix spawns them as isolated subagent loops (#301).
- feat(skills): bundle `devflow-session-insight` skill that teaches the AI how and when to reach for `devflow mem` to recall past conversations across Claude Code and Codex sessions. Auto-dispatched to every supported platform on init/update.
- feat(workflow): `devflow workflow --template <id>` and `devflow init --workflow <id>` print a stderr warning when the resolved workflow references `.devflow/agents/<name>.md` files that are missing on disk, pointing the user at `devflow update`.

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(skills): rename bundled `devflow-spec-bootstarp` -> `devflow-spec-bootstrap` (typo). `devflow update --migrate` ships a `rename-dir` migration that renames the installed directory across 13 platform skill roots; missing roots are silently skipped. Historical migration manifests `0.5.17.json` and `0.6.0-beta.18.json` keep the typoed text because they describe what already shipped to users on those versions (#296).

migrations.description: Claude Code: rename installed bundled skill directory from typoed name to corrected name.

notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.22. Run `devflow update --migrate` to rename installed `devflow-spec-bootstarp/` skill directories to `devflow-spec-bootstrap/` across every platform you have configured (silently skips ones you do not). Plain `devflow update` also installs the new `devflow-session-insight` bundled skill and the `.devflow/agents/{check,implement}.md` channel runtime files.
